generated_oml:
instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system comprising a styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ volume), heatbed (214×214×3 mm), fan (0.02 m³/s airflow), three DS18S20 temperature sensors, Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller, PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers, and power supply"
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, ExternalDS18S20, InternalDS18S20A, InternalDS18S20B, RaspberryPi, PCB, PowerSupply
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214×214×3 mm heatbed controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers for thermal regulation"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow for air circulation in thermal incubator"
]

instance ExternalDS18S20 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring external temperature"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalDS18S20A : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal temperature (first sensor)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemperatureDataTransmittedA
]

instance InternalDS18S20B : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal temperature (second sensor)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemperatureDataTransmittedB
]

instance RaspberryPi : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for system management"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for high-current actuation (up to 4A)"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for thermal incubator system"
]

instance ExternalTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalDS18S20
]

instance InternalTemperatureDataTransmittedA : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalDS18S20A
]

instance InternalTemperatureDataTransmittedB : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalDS18S20B
]

instance ExternalTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from external DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler, RaspberryPiController
]

instance InternalTemperatureDataA : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from internal DS18S20 sensor A"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTemperatureDataTransmittedA
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler, RaspberryPiController
]

instance InternalTemperatureDataB : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from internal DS18S20 sensor B"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTemperatureDataTransmittedB
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler, RaspberryPiController
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal energy balance model between air and environment with 2 parameters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler, RaspberryPiController
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model including heatbed thermal inertia with 4 parameters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler, RaspberryPiController
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for real-time data communication between physical sensors and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimePredictionService, FaultDetectionService, ParameterCalibrationService
]

instance ScipyCalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ParameterCalibrationService
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B for system control and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimePredictionService, FaultDetectionService, ParameterCalibrationService
]

instance HeatbedControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for heatbed control via MOSFETs"
    DTDFVocab:provides HeatbedActuation
]

instance FanControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for fan control via MOSFETs"
    DTDFVocab:provides FanActuation
]

instance PCBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PCB design with MOSFETs and optocouplers for high-current actuation (up to 4A)"
    DTDFVocab:enables HeatbedControlService, FanControlService
]

instance RealTimePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature prediction using calibrated thermal models (Model A and Model B)"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Safety monitoring of temperature deviations for fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureDeviationInsight
]

instance ParameterCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Parameter calibration using non-linear least squares optimization for model accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedModelInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values used for control decisions"
]

instance TemperatureDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected temperature deviations triggering safety actions"
]

instance CalibratedModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized model parameters for accurate thermal predictions"
]

instance HeatbedActuation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control of heatbed power via MOSFETs for temperature regulation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FanActuation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control of fan speed via MOSFETs for air circulation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BangBangControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bang-bang controller decisions based on temperature predictions (LL, UL, H, C parameters)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed adjustments) generated by the controller are sent via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which interfaces with the PCB's MOSFETs to actuate the heatbed and fan."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components including RabbitMQ server (hosted on Raspberry Pi), low-level driver, controller, with data flow between PT sensors/actuators and DT components via RabbitMQ message broker."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, as the DT integrates models to monitor and predict behavior of the deployed physical system under current operating conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models validated by comparing predictions with experimental data; Model B better captured thermal inertia. Temperature uniformity tested with sensor placement, showing max discrepancy of 7°C (12V fan) and 6°C (18V fan)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for data exchange between PT and DT components, with communication via message queues for synchronization."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and controller software hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, with low-level driver and communication server running locally on the same device."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain device safety; temperature control limits (LL, UL) implemented in the controller to prevent overheating and ensure operational safety."
]
